subject: Garbodor, a large garbage-bag-shaped Pokemon with protruding refuse and toxic coloring
description: Garbodor fills the center frame as a bloated, irregular creature resembling a torn and overflowing garbage bag. The body has a mottled, lumpy surface texture in dark purples and greens, with various objects and debris appearing to protrude from or be embedded in the mass. The coloring shifts across dark purple, murky green, and grey — evoking toxic or putrid material. The setting is dim and suggests an urban or industrial space with a dark background. The overall impression is one of excess, decay, and pollution.
foreground: Garbodor, bloated garbage-bag form, dark purple-green coloring, debris-embedded body
